title: Earnings Whisper Data for Datadog, Inc.
text: Datadog Earnings Whisper Data and Investor Sentiment. Recent Earnings Performance: Datadog reported strong Q1 2026 financial results significantly surpassing analyst expectations with an earnings per share EPS of 0.60 exceeding the forecasted 0.51 by 17.65 percent and revenue reaching 1 billion surpassing the anticipated 959.9 million. Investor Sentiment: Datadog's strong Q1 2026 performance has positively influenced investor sentiment as reflected in the substantial stock price increase. More specifically Datadog's stock jumped 31.33 percent in pre-market trading reaching 188.73 following the announcement. Retail Investor Activity: Positive sentiment prevails among retail investors with 0.7 percent of TipRanks retail investors changing their holding of DDOG in the last 7 days. Analyst Outlook: Among 45 analysts covering DDOG stock the consensus is Strong Buy based on 39 Strong Buy ratings 3 Moderate Buys 2 Holds and 1 Strong Sell. Valuation Consideration: InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is currently overvalued relative to its Fair Value with shares trading at a P/E ratio of 460.87.
